title: AI Chat UX Overhaul & Custom MoneyWorks Tools
description: Replace generic Claude Code tools (Read, Write, Bash, Grep, Glob) with purpose-built MoneyWorks tools that directly query the SDK. Fix critical UX issues: non-scrollable chat, poor message formatting, overwhelming tool calls. Add debug logging and observability for tool execution analysis.
why: Enable accountants and developers to get MoneyWorks answers in 1-2 tool calls instead of 10+ generic file operations - making the AI assistant actually useful for business queries rather than a noisy code explorer.

tasks.title: Create MoneyWorks SDK client wrapper for AI tools
tasks.description: Create a MoneyWorks client singleton in packages/ai/app/lib/moneyworks-client.server.ts that wraps SmartMoneyWorksClient. Should read config from mw-config.json at project root, expose async initialization, and provide methods for tables, schema, query, eval. This is the foundation all MW tools will use.

tasks.title: Implement mw_tables tool
tasks.description: Create packages/ai/app/lib/tools/mw-tables.ts using betaTool pattern. Tool lists all available MoneyWorks tables with field counts. Use SmartMoneyWorksClient.listTables() and getTableInfo(). Return JSON array with {name, fieldCount, description} for each table.

tasks.title: Implement mw_schema tool
tasks.description: Create packages/ai/app/lib/tools/mw-schema.ts using betaTool pattern. Input: {table: string}. Output: field definitions array with {name, type, description, constraints, position}. Use SmartMoneyWorksClient.getTableInfo() and field discovery. Essential for Claude to understand table structure before querying.

tasks.title: Implement mw_query tool
tasks.description: Create packages/ai/app/lib/tools/mw-query.ts using betaTool pattern. Input: {table: string, filter?: string, fields?: string[], limit?: number}. Use SmartMoneyWorksClient.smartExport() with filter search expression. Return JSON array of records. This is the primary tool for data retrieval.

tasks.title: Implement mw_eval tool
tasks.description: Create packages/ai/app/lib/tools/mw-eval.ts using betaTool pattern. Input: {expression: string}. Use SmartMoneyWorksClient.evaluate() to run arbitrary MWScript expressions. Return the result string. Include safety warnings in description about expression complexity.

tasks.title: Implement mw_report tool
tasks.description: Create packages/ai/app/lib/tools/mw-report.ts using betaTool pattern. Input: {report: 'trial_balance' | 'aged_receivables' | 'aged_payables' | 'profit_loss' | 'balance_sheet', asOf?: string}. Use MWScript eval with pre-built report expressions. Returns formatted report data.

tasks.title: Update tools index to export MW tools only
tasks.description: Modify packages/ai/app/lib/tools/index.ts to export only the 5 MW tools (mw_tables, mw_schema, mw_query, mw_eval, mw_report). Remove exports and references to generic tools (read-file, write-file, edit-file, bash, glob, grep). Update toolDescriptions constant with MW-specific guidance.

tasks.title: Create tool execution logger with timing
tasks.description: Create packages/ai/app/lib/tool-logger.server.ts that wraps tool execution with timing, input/output size tracking. Export wrapToolWithLogging() that wraps betaTool run functions. Log to console with format: [Tool:{name}] started | input:{size}bytes | completed in {ms}ms | output:{size}bytes.

tasks.title: Replace Claude Agent SDK with direct Anthropic API + custom tools
tasks.description: Refactor packages/ai/app/lib/anthropic.server.ts to use @anthropic-ai/sdk directly with betaTool pattern instead of claude-agent-sdk. Remove query() usage, implement tool loop with messages API. Wire up all MW tools from tools/index.ts. Add session stats tracking (tool calls, tokens).

tasks.title: Update system prompt for MoneyWorks focus
tasks.description: Update system prompt in anthropic.server.ts to instruct Claude to: 1) Use mw_tables to discover available tables, 2) Use mw_schema to understand table structure, 3) Use mw_query for data retrieval, 4) Use mw_report for standard reports, 5) Use mw_eval only for custom calculations. Emphasize NOT exploring files.

tasks.title: Fix scrollable chat container
tasks.description: Fix packages/ai/app/components/chat/message-list.tsx scroll behavior. The ScrollArea from shadcn/ui needs proper height constraints. Set explicit h-full on parent, use flex-1 overflow-y-auto on scroll container. Ensure auto-scroll works by scrolling the inner element, not ScrollArea.

tasks.title: Enhance markdown rendering in messages
tasks.description: Improve packages/ai/app/components/chat/message.tsx markdown rendering. Add syntax highlighting for code blocks using rehype-highlight or similar. Ensure tables render properly with borders. Add proper spacing for lists. Style inline code differently from code blocks.

tasks.title: Add timing display to tool call component
tasks.description: Extend packages/ai/app/components/chat/tool-call.tsx to show execution timing. Add durationMs field to ToolCallData interface. Display duration in header next to status badge (e.g., '245ms'). Update ToolCallInfo type in anthropic.server.ts to include timing.

tasks.title: Improve loading state indicator
tasks.description: Enhance loading state in packages/ai/app/components/chat/message-list.tsx. Show which tool is currently executing (if available). Add subtle pulse animation to thinking indicator. Ensure UI remains interactive (input not disabled except during submission).

tasks.title: Add session stats display
tasks.description: Create packages/ai/app/components/chat/session-stats.tsx component. Display: total tool calls, total input/output tokens, estimated cost ($). Add to CardHeader in _index.tsx. Stats should update after each response. Include small info icon with tooltip explaining cost calculation.

tasks.title: Run TypeScript compilation and fix errors
tasks.description: Run 'bun run typecheck' from packages/ai directory. Fix all TypeScript errors in new and modified files. Ensure no type errors in: moneyworks-client.server.ts, all mw-*.ts tools, anthropic.server.ts, tool-logger.server.ts, UI components.

tasks.title: Integration test: dev server startup
tasks.description: Start dev server with 'bun --bun run dev' from packages/ai. Verify: server starts without errors, chat UI loads at root route, no console errors in browser, can type in input field. Document any issues found.

tasks.title: Integration test: MoneyWorks query workflow
tasks.description: Test query 'list all accounts' end-to-end. Verify: 1) Claude uses mw_tables or mw_query (not file tools), 2) Total tool calls <= 3, 3) Response shows account data, 4) Tool calls display with timing, 5) Session stats update. Test requires MoneyWorks connection.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Chat container is scrollable with auto-scroll to latest message on new content
Assistant messages render markdown properly (headers, code blocks, lists, tables)
Tool calls are displayed in collapsible sections showing name, input, output, timing, and status
mw_query tool exists that queries any MoneyWorks table (Account, Transaction, Name, Product, etc.) with optional search filter
mw_report tool generates common MoneyWorks reports (trial balance, aged receivables, P&L) via MWScript eval
mw_eval tool evaluates arbitrary MWScript expressions for custom calculations
mw_tables tool lists all available MoneyWorks tables with field counts
mw_schema tool returns field definitions for a given table (name, type, description, constraints)
Generic Claude Code tools (Read, Write, Bash, Grep, Glob) are removed or disabled
Debug logging captures all tool calls with: name, input summary, output size, duration ms
UI displays session stats: total tool calls, total tokens used, estimated cost
Query 'list all accounts' results in 1-2 tool calls (mw_query or mw_tables + mw_query), not 10+ file operations
System prompt instructs Claude to use MoneyWorks tools for data queries, not file exploration
TypeScript compilation passes with zero errors for all new tool files
Dev server starts successfully and chat UI loads without errors
Loading state shows animated indicator without blocking UI interaction

q1.question: Why does the AI chat need custom MoneyWorks tools?
q1.answer: The current generic tools (Read, Write, Bash, Grep, Glob) require Claude to explore the codebase to answer simple accounting questions, resulting in 10+ tool calls for queries that should be instant.

q2.question: Why is excessive tool calling a problem?
q2.answer: Each tool call adds latency (network + execution), consumes tokens (cost), and pollutes the UI with irrelevant technical details that accountants don't understand or need to see.

q3.question: Why do accountants need a simpler interface?
q3.answer: They want to ask 'What's my trial balance?' and get the answer - not watch Claude read package.json, grep for client imports, read the smart client source, then finally query the API.

q4.question: Why is direct MoneyWorks access better than file exploration?
q4.answer: The SmartMoneyWorksClient already has efficient methods for querying tables, running reports, and evaluating expressions. Tools should expose this API directly, not force Claude to rediscover it each session.

q5.question: What is the fundamental need?
q5.answer: Bridge the semantic gap between business questions and MoneyWorks data - let Claude be an accounting assistant, not a code explorer.

fiveWhysAnalysis.rootCause: Enable Claude to answer MoneyWorks questions directly via SDK instead of reverse-engineering the codebase each time

referenceImplementation.relevance: Existing betaTool pattern from AITOOLS-001 to replace with MW-specific tools
